description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book the cheapest full-leg waxing service lasting at least 45 minutes for next Wednesday at 2:30 PM
tasks.description: Find full-leg waxing services, filter to show only options with a duration of 45 minutes or longer, sort by price, and book the cheapest one available for next Wednesday at 2:30 PM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu option labeled 'Waxing Services' or similar.
In the body area filter on the waxing menu page, click and select 'Legs' and then select 'Full Leg' from the subcategory list.
Locate the duration filter or dropdown and set the minimum duration to '45 minutes' or select checkboxes that result in only services of 45 minutes or longer being shown.
Open the sort dropdown for the service list and select 'Price: Low to High' to sort the full-leg waxing services by price.
From the sorted list, click on the first full-leg waxing service that displays a duration of at least 45 minutes to open its detail or booking page.
On the service detail or booking page, click the date selector and choose the next date on the calendar labeled 'Wednesday'.
Within the time slots shown for that Wednesday, click on the '2:30 PM' time slot.
Click the button labeled 'Add to Booking', 'Continue', or similar to add this appointment to your booking summary.

tasks.name: Create a custom 90-minute waxing appointment under $150 by combining multiple areas
tasks.description: Build a combined waxing appointment by selecting multiple individual waxing services so that the total duration is between 80 and 100 minutes and the total price stays under $150, then proceed to the booking summary.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the 'Waxing Services' section from the main navigation.
On the waxing menu page, locate and click an option like 'Build Your Own Waxing Session' or start selecting individual areas from the list of services.

From the list of waxing services, add at least one major area service (e.g., Brazilian, Full Leg, or Full Back) to your session by clicking its 'Add' or 'Select' button, making sure its price is under $100.

Scroll through the list and add 2–3 additional smaller-area services (such as 'Upper Lip', 'Eyebrows', 'Underarms', or 'Chin') by clicking their 'Add' buttons until the combined displayed session duration is between 80 and 100 minutes.

While selecting services, ensure the running total price shown in the session summary panel remains below $150; if the total exceeds $150, remove one service by clicking its 'Remove' or trash icon in the summary and replace it with a cheaper service from the list.
Once the session summary shows a total duration between 80 and 100 minutes and a total price under $150, click the 'Continue to Booking' or similar button.

On the booking page, choose the earliest available appointment date shown on the calendar and select the earliest time slot available on that date, then click the button to move to the booking summary page.

tasks.name: Select a waxing package that includes Brazilian and underarm waxing for under $120
tasks.description: Compare waxing packages to find one that includes both Brazilian and underarm waxing, costs less than $120, and has a total duration of 60 minutes or more, then add it to booking.
steps: Go to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on 'Packages' or 'Waxing Packages'.
Use any available category or filter options to show only 'Body Waxing Packages' or similar that include multiple services.
Scan through the displayed packages and click on each package name or 'View Details' link for at least two different packages to open their detail views in turn.
For each package you open, look at the included services list and identify any package that includes both 'Brazilian' and 'Underarm' waxing, and note its listed price and total duration.

From the packages that include both services, choose the package with a price under $120 and a duration of at least 60 minutes; if more than one qualifies, select the one with the lowest price by returning to its detail view.
On the selected package’s detail page, click the 'Book Package', 'Select', or similar button.

On the booking screen for this package, select any available date next week (use the first date in the calendar that falls in the next calendar week) and choose a time slot between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM, then click the button to proceed to the booking summary.

tasks.name: Schedule three monthly Saturday eyebrow waxing appointments between 9–11 AM with the same technician
tasks.description: Set up recurring eyebrow waxing appointments by booking three separate sessions on Saturdays within the next three months, each between 9:00–11:00 AM, with the same preferred technician selected each time.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the 'Waxing Services' section and then choose the 'Face' or 'Brows' category.
In the list of facial waxing services, click on the 'Eyebrow Wax' or similarly named service to open its booking page.
On the eyebrow waxing booking page, open the technician selector dropdown or list and choose any named technician (for example, the first available technician in the list).

Use the calendar to select the next date labeled 'Saturday' within the current month, then choose a time slot between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM and click the button to add this appointment to your booking.

Return to the calendar on the same booking flow (or click an option like 'Add Another Appointment') and select a Saturday approximately one month later within the next month, keeping the same technician selected and choosing a time between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
Repeat the previous step one more time to select a Saturday approximately two months from now, again with the same technician and a time between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.

After all three eyebrow waxing appointments are listed in your booking summary with the chosen technician, click 'Continue', 'Review Booking', or the equivalent button to move to the final review page.

tasks.name: Book same-day men’s chest and back waxing after 5:00 PM
tasks.description: Find men’s waxing services and create a combined appointment for chest and back waxing on the earliest available time today after 5:00 PM, then proceed to the booking summary.
steps: Open the website homepage.
From the main menu, click on 'Men’s Waxing' or, if not directly visible, click 'Waxing Services' and then select a 'Men' or 'For Men' filter.
On the men’s waxing page, locate the 'Chest' waxing service and click its 'Add' or 'Book' button to include it in your appointment.
On the same page, locate the 'Back' waxing service and click its 'Add' or 'Book' button so both chest and back are included in your appointment summary.
Click on the 'Continue to Booking' or 'Select Time' button to open the scheduling interface for the combined services.
On the calendar, make sure today's date is selected (if not, click on today’s date).
In the list of available times for today, scroll if needed and select the earliest time slot that is at or after 5:00 PM.
Click the button labeled 'Continue', 'Add to Booking', or similar to move to the booking summary showing the combined chest and back waxing appointment.

tasks.name: Add two waxing aftercare products under $30 with 4+ stars and in-store pickup
tasks.description: Navigate to the aftercare products section, filter for waxing aftercare items under $30 that have a rating of at least 4 stars and are available for free in-store pickup, then add two different qualifying products (quantity 1 each) to the cart.
steps: From the website homepage, click on 'Shop' or 'Products' in the main navigation.
In the product categories, click on 'Aftercare' or 'Waxing Aftercare' to view related products.
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to $30, applying the filter so that only products priced at $30 or less are shown.
Use the rating filter and select '4 stars & up' or the closest available option to restrict the list to products with at least 4-star ratings.
Locate the fulfillment or delivery filter and select 'In-store Pickup' or 'Free Pickup' to show only products that can be picked up at the salon.
Scroll through the filtered list and click on the first waxing aftercare product to open its detail page, then click the 'Add to Cart' button with the default quantity set to 1.

Navigate back to the filtered product list (using the back button or 'Continue Shopping') and click on a different waxing aftercare product that also appears in the filtered results, then click 'Add to Cart' with quantity 1.
Click on the cart icon or 'View Cart' link in the header to open the cart page with both selected waxing aftercare products.

tasks.name: Purchase a $100 waxing-only gift card with a scheduled email delivery date
tasks.description: Find a gift card option restricted to waxing services, set the amount to $100, choose a scheduled delivery for a specific future date, and proceed to the checkout page without completing payment.
steps: Go to the website homepage.
Click on 'Gift Cards' or 'Gift Certificates' in the main navigation.
On the gift cards page, use any available category or filter to select a 'Waxing Only' or 'Waxing Services' gift card option, then click it to open the detail form.
In the amount field or amount selector, choose or type '$100' as the gift card value.
Locate the delivery method options and select 'Email Delivery' or similar.
Enable or click the option for 'Schedule for Later' or 'Send on a Specific Date', then use the date picker to select a date exactly two weeks from today.
Fill in the recipient name field with 'Alex Waxing' and the recipient email field with 'alex@example.com', then enter a short message such as 'Enjoy a waxing session on me!' in the message field.
Click the 'Add to Cart', 'Buy Gift Card', or similar button, then click on 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout' to reach the checkout page (stop before entering any real payment details).

tasks.name: Apply a 10% off waxing package promo code to a package over $100
tasks.description: Find a special offer that provides 10% off any waxing package over $100, select an eligible package priced above $100, apply the promo code at checkout, and reach the order review page.
steps: Start on the website homepage.
Click on the 'Offers', 'Promotions', or 'Specials' link in the main navigation or footer.
On the offers page, locate a promotion that states '10% off any waxing package over $100' or similar, and note the promo code text exactly as shown (for example, 'WAX10').
Use the navigation to go to the 'Waxing Packages' section by clicking 'Services' or 'Packages' and selecting waxing packages.
Browse through the list of packages and click on a package priced over $100 (for example, any package with a listed price of $101 or more) to open its detail page.
On the selected package’s detail page, click 'Book Package', 'Add to Cart', or a similar button to start the booking or purchase flow.

Proceed through the booking steps until you reach the cart or checkout page where a promo or discount code field is visible, then click into the promo code input field and type the code you noted (for example, 'WAX10').
Click the 'Apply', 'Submit', or similar button next to the promo code field, then click 'Continue', 'Review Order', or the equivalent button to reach the final order review page before payment.
